consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Binar Handling AB' with address and country Sweden in the certificate matches exactly the issuer and identifiable party 'Binar Handling AB' in the invoice including address and country after normalization. Legal name matches directly with only allowed normalization of legal entity form and address. Rule 4.1.0 on identification in invoice and 4.1.3.6 on legal entity suffix applied. Country matches exactly after normalization according to 4.1.4.

Company name and country matches per 4.2.2.1 and 4.2.3 rules. Invoice's 'Invoice to' and delivery address fields confirm the consignee identity. No conflicting consignee name found.

goods_description.motivation: Certified goods descriptions including Quick-lift arms 200i, 300i, Installation Kit Pillar and Pillar match invoice line items with corresponding product names and item numbers after normalization despite minor variations in text formatting or added descriptive terms. Article numbers and precise terms in invoice correspond to certificate descriptions per 4.3.2 priority verification via article numbers and exact matches.

quantity.invoice_value: Quantity per item with weights and units per line matching certificate quantities including total gross weight of 7898.2 kg found in invoice totals.
quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity values including gross weights and item weights are explicitly identified in invoice per line with matching numeric values and units (kg) after normalization including comma used as decimal separator. Total gross weight 7898.2 GW perfectly matches invoice total weight. Allowed decimal trunking and unit matches per 4.4.3 and tolerance respected. No conflicting quantities found.

origin.invoice_value: Country of Origin: SE (Sweden) for multiple items explicitly stated in invoice lines, and multiple confirmations of EU preferential origin with certificate issuing party located in Sweden.
origin.motivation: Certificate country of origin 'Sweden' matches multiple invoice lines with explicit 'Country of Origin: SE' codes. The invoice includes an EU preferential origin statement and detailed origin per item lines. The equivalence of ISO code SE to Sweden is applied per normalization rule 4.5.4.1 and 4.6. No conflicting or missing origin found.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All required control points including consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin have been positively verified with exact or normalized matching values from certificate and invoice. No mismatches or uncertainties found that require manual review.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Certifikatets avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, mängder och ursprungsland är tydligt verifierade i fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
